basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Environmental Science/ Biotechnology/ Zoology/ Botany, B.E./B. Tech in Environmental/ Biotechnology Engineering from a recognized University
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Environmental Science/ Biotechnology/ Zoology/ Botany OR B.E./B. Tech in Environmental/ Biotechnology Engineering from a recognized University.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I position is 15th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Environmental Science, Biotechnology, Zoology, or Botany, or a B.E./B. Tech in Environmental or Biotechnology Engineering from a recognized university to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I position will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this CSIR-NEERI recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Associate-I position is contractual. This means the appointment will be for a specific period as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. In which city and state is this CSIR-NEERI recruitment taking place?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a position in Kolkata, West Bengal. Candidates applying should be willing to work in this location.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment is RECRUIT_RC_4C_Kolkata_08062026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read the notification thoroughly before applying.
